Retrospective Qwen3-14B Think ON LoRA calibration. Full bfloat16, no quantization, device_map=auto, enable_thinking=True. Training uses thinking prompts and CoT chat template. LoRA r=16 alpha=32 dropout=0.05 targeting q/k/v/o/gate/up/down. batch=1 grad_accum=16 epochs=3 lr=2e-4 max_length=2048. Inference uses max_new_tokens=1024 and fixed MT parsing to output pred_mi/pred_ml/pred_pg/pred_act.
